_x0030_.VALUE: Check the status Of items sent For repair
Your action will result in the deletion or cancellation of this RMA request.
RMA Number for Parts Request Only

CipherLab Service Center will send for a courier to pick up the faulty unit if it is covered by the old comprehensive warranty or Premium warranty. Any other item, that does not have the old comprehensive warranty or Premium warranty, in the delivery box to the service center will incur an additionalcharge of delivery.
Please confirm if repair is needed.
Please pick a model you are going to repair and key in the barcode number.
Duplicate serial number input.XXXXXXXXXXXXX (Not allowed to input duplicates within 24 hours)
The file format/size is over the specifications.
Save the request temporarily. The request will not become effective unless the 'Submit' button is clicked.

Please make the payment within 3 days.Once we have confirmed your payment,we will proceed to repair.*PLEASE BE ADVISED THAT YOU WILL BE CHARGED A 20% PROCESSING AND ADMINISTRATIVE FEE BY CIPHERLAB IF YOU REQUEST A REFUND.

Please be aware that if you refund, credit back or cancel your credit card payment transaction, CipherLab will charge you a 20% processing and administrative fee which will be applied directly to your account.
The address is your basic info which not allowed to deleted.
CipherLab Service Center will send for a courier to pick up the faulty unit because it's covered by comprehensive warranty / Premium warranty.
This RMA discount process is in progress. Please wait until the process is completed before making confirmation.
The quotation is under review. Please wait.

To CipherLab Service Center,

 [$Customer Name$] has filed a service request with RMA number of [$RMA No$] on [$Request Date$]. .

 The customer may track the status on Cipherlab E-RMA system, http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw , anytime during the course of service.


Best Regards,
 Cipherlab E-RMA Service Center

Dear [$Repair User Name$],
 Your RMA:[$RMA No$] Have been Canceled.

 RMA Note: 
 [$RMA REMARK$] 



To check the application status, or to see detailed application information, please visit our RMA website: http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw and select "status query" link.
 Thank you for using the RMA system.


 == This is an automated system notification, please do not reply. ==
 == For any system operation issues, please contact Cipherlab E-RMA Administrator: [$Email URL$] ==

 Best Regards,
 Cipherlab E-RMA Service Center
Please key in your Account ID and Email Address, System will send the password to your email in 10 minutes.
Problem with RMA No. please contact system administrator!
problem with ID number, please contact system administrator!
Customer ID is repeated, please check again !
Customer ID is repeated, please check again !
Please enter the start date of display.
This code already exists RMA Request
This code already exists RMA Request
Your account information of Cipherlab E-RMA system.

This mail is to replay you that your RMA account information as below.
 Company Name: [$Company Name$] Login ID: [$Account ID$] Login Password: [$Password]
 Please visit http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw and try to login with above ID and Password. It is recommended to change your password for security reason.
 Thank you for using the RMA system.


 == This is an automated system notification, please do not reply. ==
 == For any system operation issues, please contact Cipherlab E-RMA Administrator: [$Email URL$] ==

 Best Regards,
 Cipherlab E-RMA Service Center
[$Customer's Name$] RMA Request was Quoted over discount by [$Sales Name(Submit person)$] on [$Quoted submit date$].

You have received a RMA application on RMA System, from [$Customer Name$], which is quoted over discount on behalf of [$Sales Name$] on [$Sales Confirm Date$]. To see the detail quoted contents and to submit your comments, please visit [$Supervisor login url$] or visit http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw on Status Query page.
 Thank you for using the RMA system.


 == This is an automated system notification, please do not reply. ==

 Best Regards,
 Cipherlab E-RMA Service Center
Your RMA Request No: [$Request No$] was successfully submitted to CipherLab on [$Request Date$].

Dear [$Applicant Name$],
 This notice is to confirm, as of [$Request Date$], the RMA system has received your RMA application and allocated Authorization number: [$RMA No$].
 To check the application status, or to see detailed application information, please visit our RMA website: http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw and select "status query" link.


Please print out your RMA Request Form, pack the form with your device, and send both the form and your device to the service center address shown on your RMA Request Form.


Thank you for using the RMA system.

Dear [$Sales Name$] / [$Assistant Name$],
 This notice is to confirm, as of [$Request Date$], We have has received [$Customer Name$] RMA application with authorization number: [$RMA No$]. To check the application status, or to see detailed application information, please visit our RMA website: http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw and select "status query" link.


Please print out your RMA Request Form, pack the form with your device, and send both the form and your device to the service center address shown on your RMA Request Form.


Thank you for using the RMA system.

Your Parts Request RMA No: [$Request No$] was successfully submitted to CipherLab on [$Request Date$].
Password has been sent to registered email account shortly. Please check your mail
Account or email address not found! Please contact CipherLab.
&ltPlease fill in html code to below text box&gt
Password Changed Successfull! Please login with this password.
Please pick a model you are going to request repair or key in barcode number.
Please select a model number from list below.
This shipment Notice has been reviewed.
Please select a Address from below lists.
Please click radio box for Part's selection and get window closed from below lists.
Entries incomplete!! Please enter all details and re Submit
Record in use by another user
This item has been received, This RMA can not be modified!
Some goods Warranty in one month.
please fill in Model or SN!!
Please enter unit price of labor hour
Please enter the lowest discount percentage.
Please fill in the header below and click button Go, system will list the price table.
Please pick one product group from below lists and get window closed.
Please pick part no from below lists and get window closed.
Import patch of serial No. and output warranty information to below:
Serial Number Duplicate! Please Check Detail List or Excel!
Serial Number Can Not Empty,Please Check Detail List!
System Not Permit Serial Number Duplicate,Please Check Detail List!
This Serial Number Not Valid,Please Input Another!
This Serial Number Not Permit To Modify!
The replace information will replicate to the RMA item you ticked off below. Are you sure?
This serial number has been out of warranty,Please contact your sales representative
This serial number is not under Comprehensive Warranty, Please contact your sales representative
Current PNO of Version of this Serial
Latest PNO of Version of the Model of this Serial
Cannot be Modified Because of the inconsistency of model of selected serial
Current PNO of Version of this Serial
Latest PNO of Version of the Model of this Serial
RMA No: [$RMA No$] has SN:[$Serial No$] need to input spec or price

Dear [$HQRMA_Name$],
 Please input the following spec or price information of the part to complete the Quotaing Process...
 RMA no:[$RMA No$]
 Serial no:[$Serial No$]
 Model no:[$Model No$]
 Reason:(Lack of spec or Lack of price)


 To check the application status, or to see detailed application information,
 please visit our RMA website: http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw and select "status query" link.
 Thank you for using the RMA system.

[$Customer's Name$] Request No: [$Request No$] was successfully submitted to CipherLab on [$Request Date$].

Dear All,
 This notice is to confirm, as of [$Request Date$], We have has received [$Customer Name$] RMA application with authorization number: [$RMA No$]. To check the application status, or to see detailed application information, please visit our RMA website: http://e-rma.cipherlab.com.tw and select "status query" link.


Please print out your RMA Request Form, pack the form with your device, and send both the form and your device to the service center address shown on your RMA Request Form.


Thank you for using the RMA system.
